headline: Live Where Brookline Began
subheadline: A rare residential collection in the historic heart of Brookline Village

heroStats.label: Year Established
heroStats.detail: One of Brookline's earliest planned neighborhoods

heroStats.label: Lot Size
heroStats.detail: Among the largest private lots in Brookline Village

heroStats.label: Historic Landmark
heroStats.detail: Recognized for architectural and historical significance

points.heading: Irreplaceable Location
points.description: Steps from Brookline Village's shops, restaurants, and the MBTA Green Line. Direct access to Longwood Medical Area, Kenmore, and downtown Boston.

points.heading: Rich Heritage
points.description: Built in 1843 as part of Brookline's first garden suburb, 19 Linden Street is the best-preserved example of the original Greek Revival homes designed for Boston's merchant class.

points.heading: Rare Scale
points.description: At nearly half an acre, this is one of the few remaining large lots in Brookline Village — offering space, privacy, and light that smaller urban parcels cannot match.

points.heading: Top-Tier Schools & Community
points.description: Brookline Public Schools consistently rank among the best in Massachusetts. The neighborhood offers a walkable, community-oriented lifestyle minutes from Boston.

scenarios.name: The Heritage Collection (14 Residences)
scenarios.description: The restored 1843 Greek Revival landmark anchors a curated residential enclave of 12 new boutique residences. Each ~1,000 sqft unit features underground parking with private elevator access. The historic house is preserved as 1-2 signature homes.
scenarios.unitMix: 2 existing house units (1,200-3,000 sqft) + 12 new boutique units (~1,000 sqft)
scenarios.targetBuyer: Medical professionals, young professionals, and downsizers seeking transit-connected, character-rich living
highlights: Underground garage with elevator to each unit

scenarios.name: The Linden Estate (5-6 Grand Residences)
scenarios.description: A small, responsible development: the original Greek Revival home becomes a flagship single-family attached residence, joined by 4 new luxury townhouse-style flats. Each home is approximately 3,500 sqft — generously scaled for families and discerning buyers.
scenarios.unitMix: 1 flagship historic home (~3,500 sqft) + 4 new luxury residences (~3,500 sqft each)
scenarios.targetBuyer: Families, executives, and design-conscious buyers seeking a one-of-a-kind home with historic provenance

comparableNewConstruction.note: 1 block from 19 Linden — best comp for boutique units
Best comp for grand residence concept
1 block away, both NR-listed — sold for 70+ unit development. Proves market appetite.
